clips.title: The Singer
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A black stage in total darkness. The scene is lit by a single hard theatrical spotlight from above, a sharp pool of light isolating the person at a vintage microphone, everything else pure black. A person in stage attire sings into the mic. Single hard spotlight, pool of light, total black surround, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stage
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. An empty theater stage in darkness. The scene is lit by a single spotlight from above, a bright circular pool of light on the person standing center stage, the vast dark stage around them pure black. A person in simple clothes stands in the light. Single spotlight, circular pool, black void, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Ring
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A boxing ring in a darkened arena. The scene is lit by a single hard overhead spotlight, a stark pool of light on the person in the ring, the crowd and arena lost in black. A person in boxing gear stands in the ring. Single hard spotlight, stark pool, black surround, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Solo
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A dark dance stage. The scene is lit by a single spotlight from above, a clean pool of light on the person mid-pose, the rest of the stage pure black. A person in dancewear holds a dramatic pose in the light. Single spotlight, clean pool, black void, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Address
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A dark auditorium. The scene is lit by a single spotlight, a pool of light on the person standing at a podium, the audience and hall in total black. A person in formal attire stands at the podium. Single spotlight, pool of light, black surround, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Reveal
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A black void space. The scene is lit by a single dramatic spotlight from above, a tight pool of light picking out the person from total darkness, hard falloff to pure black all around. A person in a sharp outfit stands in the beam. Single dramatic spotlight, tight pool, hard black falloff, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.
